critical_identifiers.business_reasoning: Critical identifiers (customer_id, id) cannot be imputed. Rows without identifiers are incomplete records and cannot be traced or linked to other data sources.
critical_identifiers.risk_assessment: Low - removes only records missing key identifiers

numerical_columns.business_reasoning: Median is robust to outliers and preserves the distribution of numerical values. Appropriate for quantities, amounts, and measurements.
numerical_columns.risk_assessment: Low - median is a stable central tendency measure

categorical_columns.business_reasoning: Mode (most common value) preserves categorical distributions. Filling with the most frequent category maintains data integrity.
